name: SILVERY DRAGON PRESTRESSED MATERIALS CO., LTD. TIANJIN
summary: SILVERY DRAGON PRESTRESSED MATERIALS CO., LTD. TIANJIN manufactures and sells pre-stressed concrete steel products in China. The company offers spiral rib PC, PCCP steel, plane surface PC steel, and indented PC wires; PC steel bars; indented spiral-rip PC strands; PE strands; spiral hollow cables; and galvanized PC wires and strands. It also provides PC bar systems, which are used in CRTS I type post tension high-speed railway track plates; spiral rib wires that are used in CRTS II type pre-tensioned high-speed railway track plates; and PC steel systems, which are used in CRTS III type pre-tension high-speed railway track plates, as well as PC steel bars for mine reinforcement. The company supplies its products for use in railway, highway, water conservancy, and construction industries, as well as special pre-stressed concrete structure. It also exports its products to approximately 80 countries. SILVERY DRAGON PRESTRESSED MATERIALS CO., LTD. TIANJIN was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China.
